author: Video Games Chronicle
text: Xbox Games Showcase 2026 Review: Huge games, strange messaging Exclusives are back, but where is the line?

author: Video Games Chronicle
text: Xbox Games Showcase: Here’s everything announced during Xbox’s big show Gears of War, Halo and Fable headline Xbox's big show

author: Video Games Chronicle
text: Xbox says Gears of War and Clockwork Revolution console exclusives ‘are not timed’ Previously announced multiplatform releases will proceed as planned, Xbox says

author: Video Games Chronicle
text: Halo Campaign Evolved, Gears of War E-Day and Fable are all getting Collector’s Editions with statues All three are available to pre-order today

author: Video Games Chronicle
text: Clockwork Revolution is confirmed to be an Xbox console exclusive, but still has no release date The game will be released next year, InXile says

author: Video Games Chronicle
text: The first brand new Spyro the Dragon game in 18 years is being developed by Toys for Bob Spyro: A Realm Beyond is coming next year and will be on Game Pass

author: Video Games Chronicle
text: Persona 6 announced at Xbox Games Showcase 2026 Persona 6 has been announced, but there's no confirmed release window.

author: Video Games Chronicle
text: Microsoft is releasing a limited edition green 25th anniversary Xbox Series X The limited edition console will be released in November

author: Video Games Chronicle
text: Minecraft Dungeons 2 is coming this September The sequel to the 2020 action spin-off will be releasing this year on Xbox, PS5, PC, and Nintendo Switch.

author: Video Games Chronicle
text: Doom: The Dark Ages is getting a story DLC expansion coming this summer Revelations is coming next month

author: Video Games Chronicle
text: Xbox strategist says announced console exclusives ‘are not a one-off’ and fans can expect more Xbox says it announced two console exclusives to show that it's serious

author: Video Games Chronicle
text: The Super Mario Galaxy Movie has finally passed $1 billion globally, making it the first 2026 film to do so It's only the fourth animated series to pass $2 billion with its first two films

author: Video Games Chronicle
text: Ninja Theory’s experimental horror game Project Mara has been cancelled, studio head says The decision meant the entire studio could focus on the third Hellblade game, Senua

author: Video Games Chronicle
text: FF7 Rebirth Chocobo Races: Best bird and equipment The best Chocobo and gear to use to win every Golden Saucer Chocobo Race in Final Fantasy 7 Rebirth.

author: Video Games Chronicle
text: Goodbye Pizza Hut, hello Five Guys? Here’s some of the new real-life shops we’ve spotted in Crazy Taxi World Tour The first game was famous for featuring real brands, and the reboot has more

author: Video Games Chronicle
text: Nintendo has confirmed that its next Nintendo Direct will take place tomorrow The 50-minute show will be followed by a 95-minute Nintendo Treehouse Live

author: Video Games Chronicle
text: FF7 Rebirth: How to beat the Shadowblood Queen in Queen’s Blood Best deck and strategy to beat the Shadowblood Queen at Queen's Blood in Final Fantasy 7 Rebirth.

author: Video Games Chronicle
text: Thief: The Dark Project is the next classic game to be remastered by Nightdive Studios The remaster is coming to all formats this Winter

author: Video Games Chronicle
text: Konami’s next 2D Castlevania game, Belmont’s Curse, is arriving in time for Halloween The game will also be coming to Switch at a later date

author: Video Games Chronicle
text: Vivarium is a life sim with an art style strongly influenced by Studio Ghibli films The game is coming to Xbox and PC next year

author: Video Games Chronicle
text: Xbox pulls Gears video featuring a PS5 logo, 24 hours after announcing it as an exclusive Pulled Xbox video appears to suggest exclusivity decision was made late
